ucs.title: [LLM] MuddyWater PowGoop loader: goopdate.dll DLL side-load via GoogleUpdate.exe outside Program Files
ucs.description: Hunts MuddyWater's signature PowGoop first-stage loader, which renames a legitimate Google Update binary and side-loads a malicious goopdate.dll from a non-Google directory (typically %APPDATA%, %TEMP%, %ProgramData% or C:\Users\Public). PowGoop has been the trademark MuddyWater (MERCURY / Mango Sandstorm / Static Kitten / Seedworm) loader since 2021 and has been documented by Mandiant, Cisco Talos and Deep Instinct as a near-exclusive MuddyWater artefact.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name="goopdate.dll" AND NOT (Filesystem.file_path="*\\Program Files\\Google\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\*") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | append [ | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="GoogleUpdate.exe" AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") AND Processes.parent_process_path!="*\\Program Files\\Google\\*" AND Processes.parent_process_path!="*\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\*" by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// MuddyWater PowGoop: goopdate.dll loaded by GoogleUpdate.exe from a non-Google folder
let GoogleLegitPaths = dynamic([@"c:\program files\google\", @"c:\program files (x86)\google\"]);
let SideLoad = DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where FileName =~ "goopdate.dll"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "GoogleUpdate.exe"
    | extend lcPath = tolower(FolderPath)
    | where not(lcPath startswith @"c:\program files\google\")
        and not(lcPath startswith @"c:\program files (x86)\google\")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, DeviceId,
              LoadedDll = strcat(FolderPath, FileName), DllSHA256 = SHA256,
              LoaderPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              LoaderCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              AccountName = InitiatingProcessAccountName;
// Tie the side-load to a follow-on PowerShell/LOLBin spawn (PowGoop -> POWERSTAR/POWERSTATS)
let ChildSpawn = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "GoogleUpdate.exe"
    | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
    | project ChildTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, ChildFile = FileName,
              ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              LoaderFolder = InitiatingProcessFolderPath;
SideLoad
| join kind=leftouter ChildSpawn on DeviceId
| where isnull(ChildTime) or ChildTime between (Timestamp - 5m .. Timestamp + 30m)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, LoaderPath, LoaderCmd,
          LoadedDll, DllSHA256, ChildFile, ChildCmd
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// MuddyWater PowGoop side-load via Sysmon EID 7 (image load) in Sentinel
WindowsEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where Provider == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" and EventID == 7
| extend Image       = tolower(tostring(EventData.Image)),
         ImageLoaded = tolower(tostring(EventData.ImageLoaded)),
         Signed      = tostring(EventData.Signed),
         User        = tostring(EventData.User)
| where Image endswith @"\googleupdate.exe"
| where ImageLoaded endswith @"\goopdate.dll"
| where not(ImageLoaded startswith @"c:\program files\google\")
    and not(ImageLoaded startswith @"c:\program files (x86)\google\")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, User, Image, ImageLoaded, Signed
| join kind=leftouter (
    WindowsEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where Provider == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" and EventID == 1
    | extend ParentImage = tolower(tostring(EventData.ParentImage)),
             ChildImage  = tolower(tostring(EventData.Image)),
             ChildCmd    = tostring(EventData.CommandLine)
    | where ParentImage endswith @"\googleupdate.exe"
    | where ChildImage has_any ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
    | project ChildTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, ChildImage, ChildCmd
  ) on Computer
| where isnull(ChildTime) or ChildTime between (TimeGenerated - 5m .. TimeGenerated + 30m)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: MuddyWater PowGoop goopdate.dll Side-Load via GoogleUpdate.exe
id: 4f7d5f1e-7c2a-4f0e-9c2c-muddywater-powgoop
status: experimental
description: Detects PowGoop loader behaviour where GoogleUpdate.exe loads goopdate.dll from a non-Google directory. Strongly attributed to MuddyWater / MERCURY / Mango Sandstorm.
references:
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/mercury-mandiant-iran-iranian-actor
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/muddywater-powgoop/
author: SOC Detection Eng
date: 2026/05/06
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: image_load
detection:
  selection_loader:
    Image|endswith: '\GoogleUpdate.exe'
    ImageLoaded|endswith: '\goopdate.dll'
  filter_legit_path:
    ImageLoaded|contains:
      - ':\Program Files\Google\'
      - ':\Program Files (x86)\Google\'
  condition: selection_loader and not filter_legit_path
fields:
  - Image
  - ImageLoaded
  - User
  - Hashes
falsepositives:
  - Repackaged Google Update installers staged outside the Program Files tree (rare in enterprise estates)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1574.002
  - attack.g0069
ucs.rationale: PowGoop / goopdate.dll DLL side-loading via a renamed GoogleUpdate.exe is a near-unique MuddyWater fingerprint - documented in Mandiant, Cisco Talos, Deep Instinct and ClearSky reports across 2021-2024 campaigns against Israeli, Saudi, Jordanian and Turkish targets. Genuine Google Update binaries always live under \Program Files\Google\, so a goopdate.dll loaded from %TEMP%, %APPDATA%, %ProgramDat
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] MuddyWater (TA450) spear-phishing chain: inbound link to legitimate RMM vendor followed by RMM agent execution
ucs.description: Hunts MuddyWater's TA450 RMM-abuse playbook: inbound spear-phish containing a direct link to a legitimate Remote Monitoring & Management installer (Atera, ScreenConnect/ConnectWise Control, Syncro, SimpleHelp, Remote Utilities, RPort, Splashtop) followed by execution of that RMM agent on the recipient's host within the next 7 days. Proofpoint, Microsoft (Mango Sandstorm) and Group-IB attribute this exact pattern to MuddyWater / TA450 across the 2022-2024 Israeli and US campaigns.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstExec max(_time) as lastExec from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("AteraAgent.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientSetup.exe","rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe","SimpleHelpCustomer.exe","Remote Access.exe","SyncroLive.Agent.Service.exe","Syncro.exe","rport.exe","SRClient.exe","SRService.exe","AnyDesk.exe","TeamViewer.exe") AND Processes.user!="*$" by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename user as recipient | join type=inner recipient [ | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Email where (All_Email.url IN ("*atera.com*","*ateraagent.com*","*screenconnect.com*","*control.connectwise.com*","*simple-help.com*","*syncromsp.com*","*remoteutilities.com*","*rport.io*","*splashtop.com*","*anydesk.com*","*teamviewer.com*") OR All_Email.subject IN ("*remote support*","*invoice*","*review document*","*PDF Reader*")) AND All_Email.action="delivered" by All_Email.recipient All_Email.src_user All_Email.subject All_Email.url All_Email.message_id | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Email)` | rename recipient as recipient ] | where firstExec > strptime("1970-01-01","%Y-%m-%d") | eval delivery_to_exec_days = round((firstExec - _time)/86400,2) | where delivery_to_exec_days >= 0 AND delivery_to_exec_days <= 7 | table _time host recipient src_user subject url process_name parent_process process delivery_to_exec_days | sort - _time
ucs.kql:
// MuddyWater (TA450) RMM-abuse spear-phish chain
let RmmDomains = dynamic(["atera.com","ateraagent.com","screenconnect.com","control.connectwise.com","simple-help.com","simplehelp.com","syncromsp.com","remoteutilities.com","rport.io","splashtop.com","anydesk.com","teamviewer.com"]);
let RmmBinaries = dynamic(["AteraAgent.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientSetup.exe","rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe","SimpleHelpCustomer.exe","Remote Access.exe","SyncroLive.Agent.Service.exe","Syncro.exe","rport.exe","SRClient.exe","SRService.exe","AnyDesk.exe","TeamViewer.exe"]);
let PhishWithRmmLink = EmailEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where EmailDirection == "Inbound" and DeliveryAction == "Delivered"
    | join kind=inner (
        EmailUrlInfo | project NetworkMessageId, Url, UrlDomain
      ) on NetworkMessageId
    | where UrlDomain has_any (RmmDomains)
    | project EmailTime = Timestamp, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress,
              Subject, Url, UrlDomain, NetworkMessageId;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where FileName in~ (RmmBinaries)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| join kind=inner PhishWithRmmLink
    on $left.AccountUpn == $right.RecipientEmailAddress
| where Timestamp between (EmailTime .. EmailTime + 7d)
| project EmailTime, ExecTime = Timestamp,
          DelayHours = datetime_diff('hour', Timestamp, EmailTime),
          DeviceName, AccountUpn, SenderFromAddress, Subject, Url, UrlDomain,
          RmmBinary = FileName,
          RmmCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImg = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by ExecTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Sentinel port: OfficeActivity (Exchange) URL hits + SecurityEvent 4688 RMM exec
let RmmDomains = dynamic(["atera.com","ateraagent.com","screenconnect.com","control.connectwise.com","simple-help.com","simplehelp.com","syncromsp.com","remoteutilities.com","rport.io","splashtop.com","anydesk.com","teamviewer.com"]);
let RmmBinariesPath = dynamic(["\\AteraAgent.exe","\\ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","\\ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","\\ScreenConnect.ClientSetup.exe","\\rutserv.exe","\\rfusclient.exe","\\SimpleHelpCustomer.exe","\\Remote Access.exe","\\SyncroLive.Agent.Service.exe","\\Syncro.exe","\\rport.exe","\\SRClient.exe","\\SRService.exe","\\AnyDesk.exe","\\TeamViewer.exe"]);
let PhishLinks = OfficeActivity
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"
    | where Operation in~ ("Send","Receive","MailItemsAccessed")
    | extend Subj = tostring(Subject), MsgId = tostring(InternetMessageId)
    | extend BodyUrls = extract_all(@"https?://[^\s\"'<>]+", tostring(EventData))
    | mv-expand BodyUrls
    | extend U = tolower(tostring(BodyUrls))
    | where U has_any (RmmDomains)
    | project EmailTime = TimeGenerated, RecipientUpn = MailboxOwnerUPN,
              Sender = tostring(Sender), Subject = Subj, Url = U;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "UserId" and Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName has_any (RmmBinariesPath)
| extend RecipientUpn = strcat(tolower(TargetUserName), "@", tolower(TargetDomainName))
| join kind=inner PhishLinks on $left.TargetUserName == $right.RecipientUpn
    or $left.RecipientUpn == $right.RecipientUpn
| where TimeGenerated between (EmailTime .. EmailTime + 7d)
| project EmailTime, ExecTime = TimeGenerated,
          DelayHours = datetime_diff('hour', TimeGenerated, EmailTime),
          Computer, Account, Sender, Subject, Url,
          RmmBinary = NewProcessName, RmmCmd = CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName
| order by ExecTime desc
ucs.rationale: MuddyWater / TA450 is the only Iranian state actor that has industrialised inbound spear-phishing with direct download links to legitimate RMM-vendor portals (Atera/ScreenConnect/Syncro/SimpleHelp/RPort) as the *primary* initial-access vector since 2021, documented by Proofpoint (TA450 cluster), Microsoft Threat Intelligence (Mango Sandstorm), Cisco Talos and Group-IB. Joining inbound delivered em

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `User` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on Event, AKSAudit.
`TargetDomainName` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on SecurityEvent.
`EmailTime` is not a canonical column of OfficeActivity.
`Computer` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on SecurityEvent, WindowsEvent, Event, Syslog, AKSAudit, DnsEvents, W3CIISLog, Heartbeat, Update, ImProcessCreate.
`Account` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on SecurityEvent.
`Url` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on EmailUrlInfo, UrlClickEvents, ThreatIntelligenceIndicator, ImNetworkSession, ImWebSession.
`NewProcessName` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on SecurityEvent.
`CommandLine` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on SecurityEvent.
`ParentProcessName` is not a column of OfficeActivity; it does exist on SecurityEvent, ImProcessCreate.
